name: Rosewood Schloss Fuschl
character: A 15th-century hunting castle perched above Lake Fuschl, twenty minutes from Salzburg. The Salzkammergut landscape is the character here — every room looks out at the Alps or the lake, and the stillness is profound. This is not a city hotel. It is a place where guests slow down, whether they intend to or not. The property has its own boat, its own lakeside Spa, and a deep connection to the Austrian countryside. Seasonal rhythms matter enormously here: the light in September is unlike any other month.

cultural_calendar.name: Salzburg Music Festival aftermath
cultural_calendar.notes: Many guests arrive from Salzburg Festival performances. A classical music thread runs through post-festival stays.

cultural_calendar.name: Alpine mushroom season
cultural_calendar.notes: Chef hosts foraging walks with local guides. The kitchen serves fresh-foraged dishes the same evening.

cultural_calendar.name: Lake swimming season
cultural_calendar.notes: Lake Fuschl is pristine and swimmable. The property's private dock is rarely crowded before 8am.

cultural_calendar.name: Advent in Salzburg
cultural_calendar.notes: Day trips to Salzburg Christmas markets. The castle itself is lit with traditional Austrian lanterns.

signature_amenities: Heated alpine spa with lake-facing hydrotherapy pool
Private Salzburg city tour with castle historian
room_amenity_options: Alpine wool blanket from local weaver (Hallstatt)
Austrian schnapps and Mozartkugeln on arrival

welcome_amenity_options.name: Austrian farmhouse basket
welcome_amenity_options.description: Local honey, fresh Bauernbrot, Styrian pumpkin seed oil, hand-rolled butter. Room temperature on arrival.

welcome_amenity_options.name: Hand-blended alpine tea service
welcome_amenity_options.description: Foraged mountain herbs blended by the property's tea steward. Served with a small ceramic pot.

welcome_amenity_options.name: Austrian Grüner Veltliner welcome
welcome_amenity_options.description: Half bottle of the property's house Grüner, with the estate's tasting notes card.

welcome_amenity_options.name: Chilled rosé at the dock
welcome_amenity_options.description: For guests arriving in warm weather — a chilled Austrian rosé waiting at the private dock, with a note from the GM.
